content: بِنِدفَع اِلتأمين بِتاَع الْبِيت مَرَّة كُلّ سَنَة
translations: eng:we pay the house insurance once a year

transcriptions.arabizi: binidfaA ilt'ameen bitaeA ilbiyt marra kullasana
